block_02: John Murphy, an American financial market analyst and a well-known author of several books on technical analysis, has developed a list of 10 essential laws of trading. These are the rules that any trader, inexperienced or seasoned, need to follow for better trade outcomes.
block_03: At the center of Murphy’s ideas is the market trend. Measuring, spotting, and catching the trend, finding retracements and reversals are just some of the laws that the famous market analyst suggests. Check the full article to learn all the ideas to help you make better trading decisions.
block_07: What’s the best time for trading?
block_10: The question about the best time for trading is very popular among traders! The truth is, the best time to trade depends on your trading approach, your time zone, and the assets you choose. Generally, traders follow the 3 trading sessions of peak activity. If you want to learn more about them, check the article below for answers.
